Human Topoisomerase I Relaxation Inhibition Assay: Human topoisomerase I relaxation assays were carried out with 0.5 U of enzyme in reaction buffer supplied by the manufacturer. The enzyme was mixed with the indicated concentration of compound dissolved before 200 ng of supercoiled pBAD/Thio plasmid DNA was added in the same buffer, for a final volume of 20 μL. Following incubation at 37° C. for 30 minutes, the reactions were terminated with a buffer containing 5% SDS, 0.25% bromophenol blue, and 25% glycerol, and analyzed by agarose gel electrophoresis.Human topoisomerase I and topoisomerase IIα were purchased from TopoGen (Buena vista, CO, USA).
